hero.subtitle: Browse hundreds of job openings from top companies. Your dream job is just a search away.

features.title: Why ZD Jobs?
features.subtitle: We make finding your next role simple, fast, and trustworthy.

search.title: Smart Search
search.description: Find exactly the right role with powerful search and filtering across hundreds of positions.

verified.title: Verified Listings
verified.description: Every job posting is verified to ensure quality and accuracy. No spam, no duplicates.

apply.title: Easy Apply
apply.description: Apply directly to companies with one click. No complicated multi-step applications.

cta.title: Ready to Take the Next Step?
cta.subtitle: Hundreds of opportunities are waiting for you. Start browsing and find your perfect match.

about.title: Connecting Talent with
about.subtitle: ZD Jobs is on a mission to make job searching simple, transparent, and effective. We believe everyone deserves to find work they love.
about.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your next role
about.step01Desc: Browse hundreds of curated job listings from top companies. Use filters to find exactly what you're looking for.
about.step02Desc: Found your dream role? Apply directly with one click. No complicated forms, no friction.
about.step03Desc: Connect with employers and start your next chapter. We're with you every step of the way.
about.qualityDesc: We verify every listing to ensure you only see real, quality opportunities. No spam, no clutter.
about.peopleDesc: Behind every job search is a person with aspirations. We build for you, not for metrics.
about.trustDesc: Clear job descriptions, honest salary ranges, and verified employers. What you see is what you get.
about.quote: We believe that finding meaningful work shouldn't be a full-time job in itself.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.sentMessage: Thanks for reaching out. We'll be in touch soon.
contact.faq1q: How do I post a job listing?
contact.faq1a: Contact us via the form or email and we'll get you set up. We're working on self-service job posting for the near future.
contact.faq2q: Is ZD Jobs free for job seekers?
contact.faq2a: Yes! Browsing and applying to jobs is completely free for candidates. Always.
contact.faq3q: How often are new jobs added?
contact.faq3a: We add new listings daily. Jobs are sourced from verified employers across the Netherlands.
contact.faq4q: Can I get notified about new jobs?
contact.faq4a: Job alerts are coming soon. In the meantime, check back regularly for the latest openings.

footer.tagline: Connecting talent with opportunity. Find your next career move with ZD Jobs.
